_meta.description: Company universe — one record per investable name across all verticals. Fields: ticker, name, vertical_id, chain_layer, geo, structure, thesis_note, conviction. Enrich over time.

companies.name: MP Materials
companies.thesis_note: Only US integrated REE miner + Fort Worth magnet plant ramp. LREE to HREE path.

companies.name: Lynas Rare Earths
companies.thesis_note: Only non-Chinese scaled REE separation. Seadrift TX DoD facility adds HREE pathway.

companies.name: Energy Fuels
companies.thesis_note: Dual REE + uranium exposure. White Mesa Mill processing monazite for REE separation.

companies.name: Centrus Energy
companies.thesis_note: Only US company with active domestic uranium enrichment. HALEU near-monopoly rebuild.

companies.name: Cameco
companies.thesis_note: Tier-1 Athabasca Basin producer. McArthur River/Cigar Lake restart. Westinghouse stake.

companies.name: Sprott Physical Uranium Trust
companies.thesis_note: Cleanest price leverage to spot U3O8. No operational or dilution risk.

companies.name: Constellation Energy
companies.thesis_note: Largest US nuclear fleet. AI PPA template (TMI-Microsoft). Fleet-wide PPA pipeline.

companies.name: NexGen Energy
companies.thesis_note: Arrow deposit — largest undeveloped high-grade uranium deposit in Athabasca Basin.

companies.name: Quanta Services
companies.thesis_note: ~40% US transmission/distribution EPC market share. Backlog growing faster than revenue.

companies.name: Eaton Corporation
companies.thesis_note: Transformer + switchgear + data center power. Multi-year backlog. AI + grid intersection.

companies.name: GE Vernova
companies.thesis_note: Wind turbines + gas turbines + grid solutions. AI power wave direct beneficiary.

companies.name: EMCOR Group
companies.thesis_note: Electrical/mechanical contractor. Data center + grid + industrial buildout leverage.

companies.name: MYR Group
companies.thesis_note: Pure-play T&D contractor. Smaller than PWR, higher torque to grid spending.

companies.name: Southern Copper
companies.thesis_note: Lowest-cost copper miner globally. 40+ year reserve life. Grupo Mexico controlled.

companies.name: Freeport-McMoRan
companies.thesis_note: Largest US copper producer. Grasberg (Indonesia) world-class deposit. High capex leverage.

companies.name: Franco-Nevada
companies.thesis_note: Gold/silver streams at Cu mines. Zero capex, geopolitically optimal above smelter layer.

companies.name: Wheaton Precious Metals
companies.thesis_note: Ag/Au streams across Cu and base metal mines globally. Best risk-adjusted structure.

companies.name: Cheniere Energy
companies.thesis_note: Largest US LNG exporter. ~$2.50-3.50/MMBTU tolling fee irrespective of commodity price.

companies.name: Venture Global
companies.thesis_note: CP2 FID pending. Next large-scale US LNG capacity tranche. European SPA-backed.

companies.name: Kinder Morgan
companies.thesis_note: Largest natural gas pipeline network in US. Fee-based, regulated cash flows.

companies.name: Energy Transfer
companies.thesis_note: Extensive pipeline + NGL network. Higher yield, more commodity exposure than KMI.

companies.name: Albemarle
companies.thesis_note: Largest US lithium company. Kings Mountain conversion facility. Reshoring IRA play.

companies.name: SQM
companies.thesis_note: Atacama lowest-cost Li brine. Post-correction entry. Chile policy risk monitoring.

companies.name: Fluence Energy
companies.thesis_note: Grid-scale battery storage. Independent demand driver from EV cycle. AI-era grid BESS.

companies.name: Perpetua Resources
companies.thesis_note: Stibnite mine — only significant Western antimony source. DoD MOU. Export controls active.

companies.name: Alphamin Resources
companies.thesis_note: World's highest-grade tin mine (Bisie, DRC). Direct AI chip packaging leverage.

companies.name: AXT Inc
companies.thesis_note: GaAs/GaN substrates for 5G, EV inverters, satellite power electronics.

companies.name: Valero Energy
companies.thesis_note: Largest US refiner. Crack spread driven — independent of crude price. Post-2020 structural.

companies.name: Tidewater
companies.thesis_note: Offshore supply vessels. Utilization ~90%+. Overlooked vs. drillers and E&P names.

companies.name: Scorpio Tankers
companies.thesis_note: Product tankers. European tonne-miles structural tailwind. Leverage to refinery dislocation.

companies.name: Nutrien
companies.thesis_note: Only company with significant scale across all three primary nutrients (N, P, K).

companies.name: Mosaic
companies.thesis_note: Potash + phosphate dual exposure. Canpotex JV logistics. Allied-nation supply security.

companies.name: Energy Recovery
companies.thesis_note: ~50% global market share in pressure exchangers for RO desalination. Near-monopoly niche.

companies.name: Vidler Water Resources
companies.thesis_note: Western US water rights. Scarcity compound interest. AI/semiconductor site constraint.

companies.name: Linde
companies.thesis_note: On-site ASU plants at chip fabs/hospitals under 15-20yr sole-source contracts. Infinite moat.

companies.name: Air Products
companies.thesis_note: On-site industrial gas + hydrogen infrastructure. ~40% global share with LIN.

companies.name: ATI Inc
companies.thesis_note: Primary US beneficiary of Boeing/Airbus titanium diversification away from Russia.

companies.name: Materion
companies.thesis_note: Only Western Be mine + only US Be processing. Defense-critical, <$1.5B mkt cap. Underowned.

companies.name: Royal Gold
companies.thesis_note: Gold royalties + streaming. No SA operational risk. Monetary hedge via cleanest structure.
